title.rendered: 2025 New Year Dev Update: Implement Width Setting

content.rendered: In response to user feedback, we have added a setting that allows users to enter their implement with. This is then used on the map to paint more accurate coverage; the width of the painted line on the map will be to scale. This should benefit those implementing land leveling or land forming designs. We're also using this setting for an upcoming new feature to provide estimated volume of earth to be moved in ditch designs (see our next post).
